commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Control UI chat thinking selector to collapse off-only non-reasoning model states into a disabled inherited Off selector and adds regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows the inherited Off option is rendered separately from the explicit off level, and the linked issue includes screenshots/video from an Ollama setup showing the duplicate Off selector state.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can fix the single lint blocker without changing the selector behavior or product direction.

target.title: fix(ui): hide thinking options for non-reasoning models
target.body:
Summary:
- Hide override thinking choices when the selected model is known not to support reasoning.
- Collapse off-only session/default thinking levels and persisted Off overrides back to inherited Off.
- Add a regression for the duplicate-Off Control UI selector state.

Fixes #84069. Thanks @DrippingMellow.

Behavior addressed: Control UI chat thinking selector showed duplicate Off choices and stayed enabled for catalog-known non-reasoning models.
Real environment tested: local Node 24.13.0 module-level selector proof; local formatter/check proof.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: node --import tsx direct resolveChatThinkingSelectState proof for a known non-reasoning Ollama model with off-only thinkingLevels and persisted thinkingLevel=off; pnpm exec oxfmt --check ui/src/ui/chat/session-controls.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts; git diff --check; .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local.
Evidence after fix: resolveChatThinkingSelectState returns no override options and an inherited Off label for the known non-reasoning model, while unknown models keep the fallback Off option.
Observed result after fix: the selector renders disabled with only Inherited: Off instead of duplicate Off choices.
What was not tested: full browser/CI UI lane locally; focused Vitest prebundle stalled before test execution, so CI owns the normal suite.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
